examples: The system of matrilineal clans was maintained throughout this period, even though some clans merged to form larger groups while others divided into smaller descent groups.
This fieldwork brings a new example for the studies of matrilineal system.
Early in human society, our society is divided into matrilineal and patrilineal clan clan.
According to the Khasi matrilineal system, Sing's sister's son, not his own, will inherit his title.
The Mosuo society in China, is both matriarchal and matrilineal and marriage in the traditional sense do not exist.
